en: Is your company willing to provide a copy of the company's financial statements for the past three years?
ISO Currency Code Information and Lists
Please select the currency that coincides with the monetary values you will provide below:
This information should be available on your company's latest balance sheet.

What is the monetary value of your total liabilities?
This information should be available on your company's latest balance sheet.
What is the monetary value of your Net Worth (total assets minus total liabilities)?
If your currency is not listed please specify below:

Please only include public information. \r\n Supporting documentation for the given years include: Income Statement, Statement of Cash Flows, Balance Sheet and/or Statement of Shareholder Equity, etc.
This information should be available on your company's 2024 Profit & Loss statement.
This information should be available on your company's 2025 Profit & Loss statement.
